title: SHAREDOL
titleNative: 洒落どる
synonyms: 洒落どる (パイロットフィルム)
synopsis: SHAREDOL is a fusion of two ideas selected from about 15 proposals made by young producers from Toei Animation and Sotsu. The Toei team's proposal is about an ordinary young man of today who timeleaps into a world where Edo and the near future are fused together and creates his own destiny... and the Sotsu team's proposal is about an idol who travels back in time to the Edo period. As a result, a pilot film on the theme of "Edo" and "Idol" was produced. The story of SHAREDOL is set in the Edo period, the Kansei era (1789-1800), a time when entertainment was strictly restricted. Based on the idea of "What if we used the knowledge of modern idols to produce Edo girls?" it depicts idol activities of girls living with their own problems. The protagonist produces six girls - a teahouse girl, a samurai girl, a Dutch trading house girl, a merchant girl, an oiran (high-ranking courtesan), and a kunoichi (female ninja), who have lived a different life. (Source: Crunchyroll, edited)

title: Onyankopon
titleNative: おにゃんこポン
synopsis: Onyankopon watched over people long ago, but one day an old woman accidentally hit Onyankopon in the head with a mallet while mashing yams. Since then, Onyankopon has been nervous about greeting people directly, and so sends subordinates to speak to them and solve their problems. He will use Afrobeat and dance to help Japanese high school girls with problems such as dieting, love, and cramming for exams. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Hypnosis Mic -Division Rap Battle- Movie
titleNative: 映画 ヒプノシスマイク -Division Rap Battle-
synonyms: Eiga Hypnosis Mic: Division Rap Battle
synopsis: "In a world where words mean power, they risk all that they stand for". The final Division Rap Battle begins. 48 different patterns, 16 new songs and 7 possible endings. This film will be Japan's first-ever interactive movie, where the audience's choices will change the development and outcome of each screening. The story unfolds differently based on the audience’s decisions, offering an entirely new participatory cinematic experience. (Source: Hypnosis Mic Youtube Channel, edited)

title: Aikatsu! x PriPara THE MOVIE -Deai no Kiseki-
titleRomaji: Aikatsu! x PriPara THE MOVIE -Deai no Kiseki-
titleNative: アイカツ！×プリパラ THE MOVIE -出会いのキセキ-
synonyms: Aikatsu! × Pripara THE MOVIE -การพบพานแห่งปาฏิหาริย์!-
synopsis: Akari Oozora and Laala Manaka. Two idols shining in their own worlds suddenly find themselves on the same stage! A magical encounter between two worlds that was never supposed to intersect: Aikatsu and PriPara ! The idols of Starlight Academy and Parajuku were enjoying a dream collaboration at the joint live festival, but before they knew it the outside world was in big trouble..!? The perfect stage packed with excitement and glitter! Everyone's friends, everyone's idols — their idol activities begin right here! (Source: Official Website, translated)

title: A Reflection of One's Mind
titleNative: 想い雲
synopsis: Realised in 2014, this beautiful animated film, subtle and graceful, is the final project year-end of a Japanese student of University of Fine Arts Tama of Tokyo : Kohei Nakaya. The choice of a silent narrative, driven by a soft and introspective music of Claude Debussy, lets you enjoy all the finesse of this teenager malaise. Lightweight and touching, A reflection of one's mind is very pleasant. The impressive maturity and control of the graphic writing, lets we expected great things for Kouhei Nakaya and his future audience. (Source: Youtube)

title: Mirai Koushi SACLA: Harima Sakura
titleNative: 未来光子 SACLA 播磨サクラ
synonyms: 未来光子 播磨サクラ
synopsis: The Japanese research lab SACLA has released a short anime titled "Mirai Koushi SACLA: Harima Sakura" to promote their X-ray Free Electron Laser (X-FEL), the brightest x-ray source in the world. As described on her official webpage, the feature character Harima Sakura is a G4-type Picodroid, a living entity with self-learning and evolutionary capability. She can shrink down and dive into the world of atoms, invisible to the human eye, known as the "Pico Universe." Her athletic ability is very high. In cooperation with a variety of researchers and scientists, she explores the world inside atoms with a strong sense of justice.

title: Genesis Climber Mospeada: Love, Live, Alive
titleRomaji: Genesis Climber Mospeada: Love, Live, Alive
titleEnglish: Genesis Climber Mospeada: Love, Live, Alive
titleNative: 機甲創世記モスピーダ Love
synopsis: After the original run of the television series, an OAV music video titled Genesis Climber Mospeada: Love Live Alive was specially (mostly due to demands of hardcore Mospeada fans) released in Japan in September 1985. The music video consisted of both old and new footage. The story of Love Live Alive chronicled the events after the ending of the original Mospeada, featuring Yellow Belmont as the main character. The music video focused on Yellow's concert and also on his flashback of past events. (Source: Wikipedia)

title: Monster Strike 2: A Rhapsody Called Lucy -The Very First Song-
titleRomaji: Monster Strike 2: Senritsu no Lucifer, Tada Hitotsu no Hajimari no Uta
titleEnglish: Monster Strike 2: A Rhapsody Called Lucy -The Very First Song-
titleNative: モンストアニメ GWスペシャル番外編「センリツのルシファー ただひとつの始まりの歌」
synonyms: Zenritsu no Lucifer: Tada Hitotsu no Hajimari no Uta
synopsis: Monster Strike 2 special episode for Golden Week 2017. "Change the world with music? Foolish." Lucy's world stops after her band disbands. Meaningless days pass, until she meets her cousin Lucifer and his bandmate Ibaraki Doji. They ask her to join their indie band, the "Wicked Pistols". Lucifer talks about his dream of going major after winning the MONSTERS ROCK competition, only for Lucy to reject him outright. However, Lucy's heart begins to thaw after a certain event... (Source: XFLAG via ANN)

title: RABBITS KINGDOM THE MOVIE
titleNative: ラビッツキングダム THE MOVIE
synopsis: A project to commemorate the 10th Anniversary of Tsukiuta. The Black Rabbit Kingdom and the White Rabbit Kingdom — Two different worlds existing side by side. The two worlds, which were supposed to be a "pair," had never met, perhaps by a twist of fate. The situation remained unstable and incomplete. Hajime, the young king of the Balck Rabbit Kingdom, is distressed by the calamities in the surrounding countries. The Prime Minister Haru, his close aides Kakeru and Koi, the prince Aoi, and his escort Arata are busy preparing for the upcoming World Congress and the ball to commemorate the 15th anniversary of Hajime's reign. At the same time, in the White Rabbit Kingdom at the suggestion of Shuno, who calls himself the Demon King, the king, Kai, the prince, Rui, the guards, Yoh and Iku, and the former military officer, Yoru, are going on a "picnic" to the Black Rabbit Kingdom. What will be born from the encounter between the Black Rabbit Kingdom and the White Rabbit Kingdom? (Source: Crunc

title: Life no Color
synopsis: In a town where discrimination based on colors is in place. A boy wearing red who is at the bottom of the society. A girl who passes him every time he is attending night high school. In the past, she had encountered the boy who scribbled on a wall. The girl who has understood the meaning of the message. At that time, what was the meaning of the girl's smile to the boy. Two people who have passed each other on countless occasions pass each other again in this short Boy Meets Girl animation. (Source: AniDB)

title: Toritsukare Otoko
titleNative: トリツカレ男
synopsis: The story centers on a young man named Giuseppe, who is called "Toristukare Otoko" by the townspeople because once he gets absorbed in something, he cannot look at anything else. One day, he falls in love at first sight with a girl selling balloons named Pechka. He goes crazy and tries to get closer to Pechka, but she has a sadness in her heart and... For the sake of his beloved Pechka, Giuseppe and his partner, the mouse Cielo, secretly solve her worries by using the many tricks he has been obsessed with. (Source: Crunchyroll News, edited)

title: Microphone Soul Spinners: Kotodama Shoujo
titleNative: Microphone Soul Spinners ~言霊少女~
synopsis: This is "Holy Hierarchy Academy," the world's best girls' high school that trains future stars. Here, the top dog students have all the control, and they possess a unique beverage: the Hierar Milk, extracted from the mythical bovine, the Hierar Beef. One swig from these divine drops bestows enough radiance and go-getter energy that nothing but the position of top dog will satisfy. Getting it means winning in battle at the academy. This year will feature the highest form of competitive self-expression, the rap battle! This youth story is about four students at the bottom of the hierarchy who meet in a rap battle and climb to to the top! (Source: Anime News Network)

title: IDOLiSH7 the Movie LIVE 4bit BEYOND THE PERIOD Day 2
titleRomaji: IDOLiSH7: LIVE 4bit - BEYOND THE PERiOD DAY 2
titleEnglish: IDOLiSH7 the Movie LIVE 4bit BEYOND THE PERIOD Day 2
titleNative: アイドリッシュセブン LIVE 4bit BEYOND THE PERiOD DAY 2
synonyms: IDOLiSH7 Movie Day 2: LIVE 4bit - BEYOND THE PERiOD
synopsis: Day 2 of IDOLiSH's Concert Film - BEYOND THE PERIOD. Aspiring idols come to Takanashi Productions to form musical groups, in hopes of finding international fame. Four groups decide to put on a live performance. IDOLiSH7, TRIGGER, Re:vale, and ŹOOĻ each have their own distinct dances, style, and presence. Together, they’ll put on a concert for the ages. Discover a performance unlike any other from the groups you’ve come to love! (Source: Crunchyroll)
